untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires multi-bar trend line analysis (expanding price range over months/years with support/resistance levels) which cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicators. The descending broadening formation is a structural pattern requiring historical slope and range expansion calculations not available in the allowed indicator set. Success rates, volume trends, and throwback percentages are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be quantified.
translation_notes: This signal describes a complex chart pattern requiring visual/structural analysis rather than indicator-based rules. Used Bollinger Bands as a proxy to approximate breakout detection (upper/lower band penetration) and mean reversion (middle band) but this is NOT equivalent to true descending broadening formation detection. Proper implementation would require: (1) trend line calculation over extended periods, (2) range expansion measurement, (3) multi-timeframe support/resistance validation. Recommend manual pattern identification or custom pattern recognition module.
